overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character in wizard robes walking across the Viaduct Bridge and through castle grounds, eventually entering the Quad Courtyard. The scene features detailed gothic architecture with stone walkways, stairs, and courtyards in a high-fidelity game engine render.

events.description: reaching the end of the bridge and approaching the main castle entrance stairs

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across the viaduct bridge toward the castle entrance

student walking in the same direction on the left side of the bridge

segments.scene_description: The character walks across the open Viaduct Bridge toward a massive gothic castle. The stone walkway is lined with benches and railings, with a lit fire brazier visible on the right. Other students in robes walk ahead in the same direction as the castle facade grows larger in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: castle exterior grand staircase and upper terrace

events.description: beginning to ascend the wide stone stairs toward the castle entrance
reaching the top of the stairs and entering the upper terrace area

agents.ego_description: climbing the grand stone stairs toward the upper level of the castle

notable_agents.action: student descending the stairs on the left side
student in gray robe walking ahead up the stairs

entered.detail: wide stone staircase leading up to the castle entrance
tall stone tower with conical roof becoming visible on the left
stone wall covered in climbing ivy and vines
flat stone terrace at the top of the stairs

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the grand stone stairs of the castle, passing other students going up and down. The view opens to reveal a gothic tower on the left and ivy-covered walls on the right. At the top, the character reaches a stone paved terrace.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved exterior walkway along castle wall leading to courtyard

events.description: turning right onto the curved walkway along the castle exterior
approaching the stone archway entrance to the quad courtyard

agents.ego_description: walking along the curved exterior path toward the courtyard entrance

entered.detail: narrow curved stone walkway following the castle wall contour
low stone wall with balustrade on the right side of the path
massive stone columns marking the entrance to the courtyard
cluster of white-barked birch trees visible beyond the railing
large stone archway entrance leading into the courtyard

segments.scene_description: The character turns onto a narrow curved walkway that hugs the castle wall, with birch trees visible beyond the stone railing on the right. The path leads toward a massive stone archway entrance with tall columns, transitioning into a more enclosed corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: quad courtyard with central fountain and ancient tree

events.description: entering the quad courtyard through the stone archway
descending stairs into the lower courtyard area toward the fountain

agents.ego_description: walking down into the quad courtyard toward the central fountain

entered.detail: cobblestone paved courtyard floor with moss between stones
ornate stone fountain with sculptural elements in the courtyard center
massive ancient tree with thick trunk dominating the courtyard background
sweeping curved stone staircase on the right side of the courtyard

segments.scene_description: The character enters the Quad Courtyard through the stone archway, revealing a mossy cobblestone area with a central fountain and a massive ancient tree in the background. The character descends toward the fountain, with curved stone staircases visible on both sides of the courtyard.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open bridge crossing toward the enclosed sanctuary of a castle courtyard. It begins with the character walking across the Viaduct Bridge, passing lit braziers and fellow students as the massive gothic facade looms larger in the distance. As the camera ascends the grand stone stairs, the view expands to reveal a towering spire and ivy-covered walls before reaching a paved terrace. The scene then shifts onto a narrow, curved walkway that hugs the castle walls and birch trees, leading directly toward a monumental stone archway. Finally, the camera passes through the columns and enters the Quad Courtyard, descending toward a central fountain and an ancient tree amidst mossy cobblestones and curved staircases.
